title: Platypus
subtitleDefault: Log in to your server, or bootstrap the first admin from the startup secret.
subtitlePinned: Sign back in to {{url}}, or bootstrap the first admin if none exists yet.

bootstrap.intro: Paste the secret from <mono><data-dir>/bootstrap.secret</mono> on the server (mode 0600, written on first boot). After the first admin exists this tab stops working.
